project_type: pnpm monorepo - 17 Next.js 15 apps + 80+ shared packages, TypeScript-first
test_framework: Vitest with vitest.config.ts at root; per-app tests in src/__tests__/
build_command: pnpm turbo typecheck && pnpm turbo build --filter=@quant/quantchat --filter=@quant/quantai --filter=@quant/quantmail --filter=@quant/api-client --filter=@quant/realtime
verification_instructions: 1. Run typecheck across affected packages. 2. Run build for the 3 apps + api-client + realtime. 3. Run tests for the same. 4. Run lint.
environment_constraints: OPEN_INTERNET - full network access. Node 22, pnpm 10 pre-installed.
contribution_requirements: One app per PR. All gates (typecheck, build, test, lint) must pass. Use established proxy pattern. Follow @quant/brand system.

key_patterns.proxy_pattern: Each app has src/app/api/_lib/proxy.ts or uses @quant/api-client proxyToBackend. Routes forward to backend via env NEXT_PUBLIC_API_URL or per-app QUANTXXX_BACKEND_URL.
key_patterns.hooks_pattern: React Query hooks in src/hooks/ - useQuery/useMutation wrapping apiClient calls
key_patterns.realtime_pattern: packages/realtime/ exports WebSocketClient (browser-safe via ./client). Apps use RealtimeProvider + useRealtime() context.
key_patterns.shared_ui: @quant/shared-ui exports AppShell, TopBar, BottomNav, ChatBubble, ChatInput, TypingIndicator, LoadingState, ErrorState, EmptyState, Card, Badge, Button, Sidebar, etc.
key_patterns.brand: @quant/brand exports spring configs, motion presets. All UI uses CSS vars like --quant-primary, --quant-border, etc.
key_patterns.api_client_sdk: packages/api-client/ exports proxyToBackend, HttpClient, createQueryHook, createMutationHook, endpoint factories

directory_structure: apps/{quantchat,quantai,quantmail}/src/{app,components,hooks,providers,services,types,__tests__} - standard Next.js App Router. packages/realtime/src/ - WS client/server. packages/api-client/src/ - shared proxy + SDK.
